findings.description: The source footnote [#threadcontext] explains that ThreadContext values are initialized AND cleared by the Web/Batch framework, so application developers do not need to set values themselves. The knowledge file omits this initialization/clearing detail — only the cross-reference to :ref:`thread-context-label` is preserved. Additionally, the source code example for the internationalization section is prefaced with a prominent '注意' comment stating the code is framework processing and application programmers should not implement it. The knowledge file's s7 does not include this warning as a note block, while s8 (the option parameter section) correctly preserves the equivalent warning as a blockquote. Without the note in s7, the ThreadContext.setLanguage() calls in the code example may appear to be expected application code.
